scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @frolf-tour/shared && npm run build --workspace @frolf-tour/api && npm run build --workspace @frolf-tour/web
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace @frolf-tour/shared" "npm run dev --workspace @frolf-tour/api" "npm run dev --workspace @frolf-tour/web"
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @frolf-tour/shared && npm run test --workspace @frolf-tour/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @frolf-tour/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @frolf-tour/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @frolf-tour/web
